papers.title: FeaXDrive: Feasibility-aware Trajectory-Centric Diffusion Planning for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: End-to-end diffusion planning has shown strong potential for autonomous driving, but the physical feasibility of generated trajectories remains insufficiently addressed. FeaXDrive introduces a feasibility-aware diffusion planning framework that ensures generated trajectories satisfy kinematic constraints and stay within drivable areas.

papers.title: OpenDriveVLA: Towards End-to-end Autonomous Driving with Large Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.summary: OpenDriveVLA is a Vision-Language-Action model designed for end-to-end autonomous driving, built upon open-source large language models. It achieves state-of-the-art results across open-loop trajectory planning and driving-related question-answering tasks.

papers.title: DiffusionPolicy-AD: Diffusion-based Policy Learning for Autonomous Driving with Safety Guarantees
papers.summary: DiffusionPolicy-AD introduces a diffusion-based policy learning framework for autonomous driving with formal safety guarantees, ensuring safe exploration and deployment in real-world scenarios.

papers.title: DiffusionDrive-2: Scalable Diffusion Models for Long-Horizon Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: DiffusionDrive-2 extends diffusion models to handle long-horizon autonomous driving tasks with improved scalability and sample efficiency.

papers.title: VLA-Driver: Vision-Language-Action Framework for Interpretable Driving Decisions
papers.summary: VLA-Driver uses vision-language-action framework to make interpretable driving decisions with natural language explanations.

papers.title: WorldModel-VLA: Integrating World Models with Vision-Language-Action for Interpretable Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: WorldModel-VLA combines world modeling with vision-language-action frameworks to create interpretable end-to-end autonomous driving systems that can explain their decisions through natural language.

papers.title: ResAD: Normalized Residual Trajectory Modeling for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: End-to-end autonomous driving systems are fundamentally challenged by the inherent spatio-temporal imbalance of trajectory data. ResAD introduces normalized residual trajectory modeling to address this imbalance and improve optimization.

papers.title: BEV-FusionNet: Multi-Modal BEV Fusion for Robust Perception in Adverse Conditions
papers.summary: BEV-FusionNet proposes a multi-modal BEV fusion framework that combines camera, LiDAR, and radar data for robust perception in adverse weather conditions, improving autonomous driving safety.

papers.title: BEV-Transformer++: Unified BEV Representation for Multi-Task Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: BEV-Transformer++ proposes a unified BEV representation that simultaneously handles perception, prediction, and planning tasks in autonomous driving.

papers.title: Occupancy-World: Occupancy Prediction for Dynamic Scene Understanding
papers.summary: Occupancy-World improves occupancy prediction for dynamic scene understanding in autonomous driving scenarios.
